info.name: Phase 3 - Admin Verification & AI Nudge
info.description:
Test collection for Phase 3 features.

Run folders in order (00 → 08).

- 00: Login as seeded admin (admin@sany3.com / Admin1234)
- 01-05: Admin provider verification
- 06: Event tracking
- 07: FCM token registration
- 08: AI Nudge job
- 09: Admin user management (create/promote admins)
